overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The player moves along neon-lit sidewalks and under overpasses, passing food vendors and digital billboards in a cyberpunk urban environment with persistent light rain and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with food stalls and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk past blue benches and food stall tables

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past food stall tables

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure covering the pedestrian walkway
futuristic benches with blue neon lighting underneath
red tables and chairs outside food vendors
large pink neon sign on building facade
rain-soaked reflective pavement surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered pedestrian walkway in a futuristic city at night. Blue neon-lit benches line the left side alongside food stall tables, while the wet pavement reflects the surrounding pink and red neon signs. The player walks forward under the covered roof as rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass with food vendor and pink neon lighting

events.description: moving from covered walkway into underpass with prominent pink neon lighting
passing by food vendor cart with umbrella on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass approaching and passing a food vendor cart

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food cart with red and yellow umbrella
futuristic car driving on the wet multi-lane road

entered.detail: street food cart with umbrella and neon lighting
intense pink neon strips lining the underpass ceiling
futuristic vending machines with glowing screens
metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper under the overpass where pink neon lights dominate the ceiling. A food vendor cart with an umbrella appears ahead on the right, while vending machines line the left wall. The environment transitions from the initial covered walkway to a more enclosed underpass with heavy neon illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass with large digital billboard and littered ground

events.description: ground becomes increasingly littered with debris, cardboard, and trash
crossing from sidewalk onto street level near the large billboard

agents.ego_description: walking under overpass past littered areas and crossing toward the open street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement screen showing character imagery
futuristic trees with red foliage lining the sidewalk
scattered trash, cardboard, and debris covering the ground
storefronts with red signage and metal shutters

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the overpass, the environment becomes grittier with litter and debris scattered across the concrete. A massive digital billboard illuminates the right side while futuristic red-leaf trees line the left. The player crosses from the sidewalk toward the street level as the underpass begins to open up.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with towering digital billboards

events.description: emerging from underpass into open street with tall glass buildings and expansive sky
futuristic cars passing by on the multi-lane wet road

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of multi-lane city street surrounded by towering neon billboards

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car driving past on wet asphalt

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure with red support beams
multiple large screens displaying advertisements on building facades
skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon trim
tall lampposts with bright white lighting

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the underpass into a wide-open multi-lane city street. Towering glass buildings covered in digital billboards rise on both sides, while an elevated highway structure looms ahead. The rain continues to fall on the wet asphalt as sparse traffic passes by, and the environment shifts from enclosed to expansive.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with concrete walkways and railings

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath elevated highway structure with metal railings

agents.ego_description: walking along covered pathway under elevated highway with graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: car with red taillights driving on the road above

entered.detail: green and yellow metal safety railings along the walkway
narrow concrete path with yellow hazard stripes
massive concrete pillars supporting the highway above
wall covered in blue and white graffiti art

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place under a massive elevated highway structure. The player walks along a narrow concrete walkway with metal railings on the right and graffiti-covered walls on the left. The environment is sheltered from the rain by the overhead highway, with support pillars visible in the distance and occasional cars passing on the road above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic city, transitioning from a sheltered neon walkway into an expansive urban street before ending beneath a massive highway. It begins on a covered pedestrian path where blue neon benches and wet pavement reflect vibrant pink and red signs. As the camera moves deeper under an overpass, the space becomes more enclosed and dominated by pink ceiling lights, passing a food vendor and vending machines before shifting into a grittier area filled with litter, red-leaf trees, and a massive digital billboard. The scene then opens up abruptly as the player emerges from the underpass onto a wide multi-lane street flanked by towering glass skyscrapers and glowing advertisements. Finally, the perspective turns toward a narrow concrete walkway sheltered by a looming elevated highway, moving past graffiti-covered walls and support pillars while cars pass overhead.
